# HHT Plants Project
First Project Plant Care Tracker

System Overview:
-System allows the user to record all plants records.
-System allows the user to record all activities carried on.
-System allows users to view all plants.
-System allows users to search for plants by name or location.
-System allows users to change the seasonal watering frequency.
-System allows users to add image to each plant.
-System allows users to view plants due for care


Featurs: 
-Repetitive menu: User will be prompted to select function after each task. Closes only after user decides to exit.
-Validation: system will validate users input to make sure they are valid.
-Modular: For readability, reusability, program build in functions.
-Mini CSV files based program: retain data in a secondary storage.
